The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] '''Starslinger Ion Drive''' was a commercially available [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]]. It cost only 20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Imperial Credits]], plus a 500 credit fee, for those that would license the engine with the Empire, and weighed 12 metric tons.
